=== info.txt
===================
===================
===================
Bob Dylan

Outdoor Amphitheater
Snow Park Lodge
Deer Valley
Park City, Utah
30 August 2002

No info about lineage and taper, drop between Cdr
Great sound


CD1

1 I Am The Man, Thomas (acoustic), 2 I'll Remember You (acoustic) (Larry on pedal steel), 3 Desolation Row (acoustic), 4 Searching For A Soldier's Grave (acoustic) (Larry on mandolin), 5 To Be Alone With You (Larry on fiddle), 6 Love Sick, 7 Honest With Me (Larry on slide guitar), 8 Moonlight (Tony on standup bass),

CD2

1 Masters Of War (acoustic) (Charlie on dobro), 2 Things Have Changed (acoustic), 3 Tangled Up In Blue (acoustic), 4 Summer Days (Tony on standup bass), 5 Make You Feel My Love (Bob on harp), 6 Drifter's Escape (Bob on harp), 7 Rainy Day Women #12 & 35 (Larry on steel guitar), (encore), 8 Like A Rolling Stone, 9 Blowin' In The Wind (acoustic) (Bob on harp), 10 All Along The Watchtower 


Concert # 1451 of The Never-Ending Tour. Concert # 21 of the 2002 US Summer Tour. 2002 concert # 68.
Concert # 52 with the 13th Never-Ending Tour Band: Bob Dylan (vocal & guitar), Charlie Sexton (guitar), Larry Campbell (guitar, mandolin, pedal steel guitar & electric slide guitar), Tony Garnier (bass), George Recile (drums & percussion).

1–4, 9-11, 17 acoustic with the band.
13, 14, 17 Bob Dylan (harmonica).
2 Larry Campbell (pedal steel guitar).
4 Larry Campbell (mandolin).
5 Larry Campbell (violin).
7 Larry Campbell (slide guitar).
9 Charlie Sexton (dobro).
15 Larry Campbell (steel guitar).
1, 4, 17 Larry Campbell & Charlie Sexton (backup vocals).
